description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a large, rectangular body and a slightly angled control panel. The front is adorned with vibrant game artwork, including dynamic fighting scenes and character portraits, with a prominent screen set into the upper half. The control panel is equipped with two joysticks and multiple colored buttons, suggesting support for two players. The sides of the cabinet are decorated with detailed graphics of various game characters and a bold, eye-catching color scheme. The top section, or marquee, displays the game's title and additional character art, illuminated for visibility. The lower front panel includes a coin slot, typical of traditional arcade machines, and the overall finish shows some wear, giving it an authentic, well-used appearance.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with vibrant fighting game artwork, dual joysticks, and a prominent illuminated marquee. The sides and front feature detailed character graphics and a coin slot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, control panel with two joysticks and buttons, illuminated marquee, and coin slot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting large character artwork, game title, and a partial view of the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel with minimal detailing and the cabinet's boxy structure.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring additional character graphics and a clear look at the control panel's layout.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, medium-sized, slightly curved with a visible bezel around the display area.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two joysticks and six colored buttons per player, arranged side-by-side for two-player gameplay, with a patterned surface.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features vibrant, illuminated artwork with fighting game characters and the game title in bold, colorful text.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels are covered with detailed, colorful graphics of game characters, arranged in a grid with a blue background and game branding.
